title: pedilonum rhabdoglossum
intro: Pedilonum rhabdoglossum, also known as Pedilanthus rhabdoglossus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pedilonum rhabdoglossum include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
